series_metadata.series_description: Records contain bank statements for all 88 Ohio counties and other various accounts, showing all banking activity in child support transactions, such as, disbursements, collections, adjustments, and Returned Deposit Items (RDI).

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in office 3 years and 5 years in records center, provided state and federal audits are completed, audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved. ; Electronic: Retain 7 years , then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
